---
title: xcode
---

```{r knitr_config, include=FALSE}
source("_knitr_config.R")
```

******************************************************************************************

#### weblinks

******************************************************************************************

#### install




##### xcode-select

```sh
# install xcode-select (also installs git)
xcode-select --install 

# verify that you’ve successfully installed it
xcode-select -p 

# check version
xcode-select --version

# check gcc version
gcc --version 
```
